'''hangumu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kadai|kadai]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-ng-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kadai|kadai]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| hangumu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hængimith|hængimith]] || [[word:hængimij|hængimij]] || [[word:hængimish|hængimish]] || [[word:hængimi|hængimi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:hangungumuth|hangungumuth]] || [[word:hangungumuj|hangungumuj]] || [[word:hangungumush|hangungumush]] || [[word:hangungumu|hangungumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:hangumuth|hangumuth]] || [[word:hangumuj|hangumuj]] || [[word:hangumush|hangumush]] || [[word:hangumu|hangumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:hangufmuth|hangufmuth]] || [[word:hangufmuj|hangufmuj]] || [[word:hangufmush|hangufmush]] || [[word:hangufmuf|hangufmuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hangumuthu|hangumuthu]] || [[word:hangumuju|hangumuju]] || [[word:hangumushu|hangumushu]] || [[word:hangumuku|hangumuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hangumuth|hangumuth]] || [[word:hangumuj|hangumuj]] || [[word:hangumush|hangumush]] || [[word:hangumu|hangumu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hangumuthul|hangumuthul]] || [[word:hangumujul|hangumujul]] || [[word:hangumushul|hangumushul]] || [[word:hangumukul|hangumukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hangumuthuthu|hangumuthuthu]] || [[word:hangumujuju|hangumujuju]] || [[word:hangumushushu|hangumushushu]] || [[word:hangumuku|hangumuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hangumuthun|hangumuthun]] || [[word:hangumujun|hangumujun]] || [[word:hangumushun|hangumushun]] || [[word:hangumukun|hangumukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hangumuthuoro|hangumuthuoro]] || [[word:hangumujuoro|hangumujuoro]] || [[word:hangumushuoro|hangumushuoro]] || [[word:hangumukuoro|hangumukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a27364f}}
